houseRules.welcomeSubtitle: — We’ll guide you to a special space —
houseRules.intro: Thank you for your continued patronage of 7-Eleven (Higashihiracho, Hiranokitani, and Ninjaichieki-Minami stores). This app is a fully closed platform exclusively for special customers (VIP) who use these three stores. To provide the best experience and fair, smooth service for everyone, please read and understand the following “gentlemen’s agreement” (house rules) before entering.
houseRules.s1_lead: For rare, limited-quantity items, FKT7 members receive the highest priority.
houseRules.s1_b1_text: To share joy fairly among as many customers as possible, allocation may be adjusted at the store’s discretion.
houseRules.s1_b2_text: Because items are highly special, unexpected shortages may occur and we may be unable to fulfill a reservation in rare cases. We will respond in good faith; please understand the nature of limited items.
houseRules.s1_b3_text: For trading cards, character prizes from lotteries or draws, and similar items with many reservations: even if manufacturer information is public, it may not be known before release whether this 7-Eleven store can carry them. Even if sold elsewhere, our store may or may not carry them. Thank you for your understanding.
houseRules.s1_b4_text: For original items managed by the store or 7-Eleven, we may answer within what we can share before release. For other manufacturers’ items where store-wide availability is not confirmed, we may be unable to answer questions before release. Availability and details may be announced on the release date. We are not the manufacturer; we cannot guarantee answers on pre-release timing, price, or specs. We will answer in good faith within what we can share—thank you for your understanding.
houseRules.s1_b5_text: Please request cancellations or changes via in-app chat. Repeated no-shows or broken promises may affect future reservation priority or app use.
houseRules.s1_b6_text: For alcohol, tobacco, and other age-restricted items, we may verify your age at the store. Thank you for your understanding.
houseRules.s2_lead: FKT7 is a confidential space built on trust between you and store staff.
houseRules.s2_b1_text: We cannot accept phone calls to the store or direct in-store inquiries about special products. To protect confidentiality, communication is limited to this app only.
houseRules.s2_b2_text: Please do not publish app-only or limited information on SNS or review sites, or disclose it to third parties. If family or friends ask, please keep details private to help protect everyone’s special space.
houseRules.s2_b3_text: Please pick up on the same day as promised, or within the next day or two. If you cannot come, tell us a clear visit date via the app.
houseRules.s2_b4_text: We may verify your identity when handing over items. Please bring valid ID.
houseRules.s2_b5_text: Staff reply directly; we are not a dedicated call center and may need time to respond. Thank you for your patience.
houseRules.s2_b6_text: Chat is for smooth communication with staff. Please avoid harassment, nuisance, or conduct that seriously interferes with work. Thank you for your cooperation.
houseRules.s3_lead: This app is intended for your personal use only.
houseRules.s3_b1_text: Keep passwords and login information to yourself; do not share or transfer them to others.
houseRules.s3_b2_text: Please do not create or use multiple accounts for the same person.
houseRules.s3_b3_text: You must register using your real full legal name so it can be verified against official identification.
houseRules.s3_b4_label: If you are not registered with your real name:
houseRules.s3_b4_text: If you have not registered with your real name, or we find that a false name was used, you may not use this app. We may suspend access without prior notice.
houseRules.s4_lead: Beyond reservations, we plan exclusive coupons and special notices—please use the app regularly.
houseRules.s4_b1_text: Terms and expiry may apply. Please follow what is shown in the app.
houseRules.s4_b2_text: Please do not obtain or use benefits for resale.
houseRules.s4_b3_text: If you are unsure how to use the app, ask staff at the store.
houseRules.s5_body: We may revise these rules for operational reasons. If revised, we will announce it in the app. Continued use after notice constitutes agreement to the revised rules.
houseRules.warning: If we observe conduct that breaks these promises or breaches trust, we may suspend app use without prior notice.
houseRules.footerAgreement: Use of this app requires agreement to the <termsLink>Terms of Use</termsLink> and <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>. By tapping the button below, you agree to these house rules (including any future revisions) and to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
